overall.description: A slow exploration of the Montreal Olympic Stadium complex in a video game engine (likely Microsoft Flight Simulator), showcasing the distinctive inclined tower and concrete stadium structure. The camera moves continuously around the plaza on a bright sunny day with scattered clouds, capturing various angles of the brutalist architecture from open plaza areas to shaded underhangs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza in front of Olympic stadium

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the inclined stadium tower against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the empty plaza while looking up at the massive inclined tower structure

entered.detail: massive inclined concrete tower with observation deck at the top, supported by cables
curved concrete and glass dome structure with ribbed roof panels
expansive paved pedestrian area with geometric tile patterns
green leafy trees in planters along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in the plaza of the Montreal Olympic Stadium. The camera moves slowly forward while panning up the iconic inclined tower, revealing its full height against a blue sky with scattered clouds. The curved stadium dome sits to the right, and the expansive concrete plaza stretches out in the foreground completely empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved plaza path wrapping around stadium perimeter

events.description: camera turns right to follow the curved path around the stadium dome
the inclined tower comes back into view from a different angle as the camera rounds the building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved plaza path, viewing the stadium's glass and concrete facade from the side

entered.detail: multi-story residential buildings visible beyond the stadium grounds
curved glass wall section of the stadium with reflective windows
dense green trees forming a boundary in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the curved plaza path wrapping around the stadium, transitioning from the front approach to the side of the building. The glass facade of the stadium becomes prominent on the left while distant apartment buildings and tree lines appear in the background. The inclined tower reappears on the left as the camera rounds the structure, maintaining the bright, sunlit conditions of the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under stadium overhang near tower base

events.description: camera enters the shadow cast by the stadium overhang, creating mixed lighting conditions
camera approaches the base of the tower and looks up at the massive concrete structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the stadium overhang and approaching the base of the inclined tower, examining the concrete architecture up close

entered.detail: massive concrete overhang creating deep shadow over the walkway
ground-level glass entrance wall of the stadium structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the shadow of the stadium's massive concrete overhang, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting. The camera approaches the base of the inclined tower, looking up at the dramatic concrete architecture from below. The space becomes more enclosed as the camera walks under the stadium structure, with the tower now looming overhead and the glass entrance walls visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the open, sun-drenched plaza of the Montreal Olympic Stadium that eventually leads into the deep shadows of its brutalist concrete overhangs. It begins by gliding forward across the empty concrete expanse, panning upward to reveal the full height of the iconic inclined tower against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. As the camera follows the curved path of the plaza, the view shifts from the front approach to the side of the building, bringing the glass facade and distant city tree lines into focus. The scene then transitions from the open sunlight into the mixed lighting of the stadium's massive underhang, where the space becomes increasingly enclosed. Finally, the camera approaches the base of the inclined tower, looking up at the looming concrete architecture from beneath the structure with the glass entrance walls visible to the left.
